mapper.sql: id, user_id, report_year, report_month, total_expense, prev_expense, diff_ratio, success_weeks, total_weeks, top_category, category_json, extra_json, one_liner, mood, category_comment, advice, user_message, gulbi_reply, replied_at, generated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monthly_report (user_id, report_year, report_month, total_expense, prev_expense, diff_ratio, success_weeks, total_weeks, top_category, category_json, extra_json, one_liner, mood, category_comment, advice, generated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reportYear}, #{reportMonth}, #{totalExpense}, #{prevExpense}, #{diffRatio}, #{successWeeks}, #{totalWeeks}, #{topCategory}, #{categoryJson}, #{extraJson}, #{oneLiner}, #{mood}, #{categoryComment}, #{advice}, #{generatedAt})
